title: NoGrief
description: Protect your structures and buildings by a simple and powerful mod by creating zones with different options.
body:
Mod review on English
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gO24VeF5870" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Mod review on Russian
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7bflveNo9xk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**How to create Zones**
Select 2 blocks with Wooden Axe and then create zone by
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b5ca73557d7ec000cd9d15590a060a8cba7d0ba.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2f7ac2e9d81486fd902641e650aa7227054ba59.png)
You have 3 options in the Zone: Strict zone, Interact, Mob Spawn. You can change them by the commands:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3551d16f54df4e5d5f611efcd980d72596e35f1.png)

What do they do:
Strict zone disables any setBlock and destroyBlock methods in your zone, by that you can protect your zone even from such things as Nuclear Bomb from Alex Caves or some bosses from Cataclysm.
Interact defines if someone else should be able to interact with chests, buttons, doors etc.
Mob Spawn defines if any entities can spawn in your zone.
